idea_fuerza_comunicacional: Un estudiante masculino supera la frustración de perder el colectivo gracias al Unipase

scene_bible_ingles.character_description: Young male student, 20s, casual clothing, backpack, worried expression
scene_bible_ingles.environment_setup: Urban bus stop, daytime, sunny, with people in the background
scene_bible_ingles.camera_style: 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, 35mm lens, realistic cinematic look, smooth camera movements

shot_list_12s.prompt_video: The young male student runs towards the bus stop, looking frustrated and worried, as the bus drives away without him, he stops and looks down, kicking the ground in disappointment
shot_list_12s.subtitulo_saliencia: ¿Pierdes el colectivo y te quedas sin transporte?

shot_list_12s.prompt_video: The student looks up, takes a deep breath, and starts searching his backpack, then pulls out a Unipase card, looks at it thoughtfully, and a hint of a smile appears on his face
shot_list_12s.subtitulo_saliencia: Descubre una alternativa digital para tu viaje

shot_list_12s.prompt_video: The student walks towards the camera, smiling, holding up the Unipase card, as he approaches the next bus stop, he jumps up and boards the bus with ease, turning back to the camera with a satisfied expression
shot_list_12s.subtitulo_saliencia: ¡Viaja de forma más simple con UniPase hoy!
